zotero.abstractNote: Symbolic regression is the task of finding a mathematical expression that best fits a given dataset. While it is a powerful tool for scientific discovery, existing methods often struggle to scale to high-dimensional data or complex expressions. We propose a novel approach that combines neural networks with symbolic regression to overcome these limitations. Our method, which we call Neural Symbolic Regression that Scales (NSRS), uses a neural network to learn a distribution over symbolic expressions, which is then optimized using reinforcement learning. We demonstrate that NSRS can scale to high-dimensional problems and discover complex expressions that are beyond the reach of existing methods.
zotero.proceedingsTitle: Proceedings of 38th International Conference on Machine Learning
